SEARCH
Package com.example.myapplication

Class Comment

java.lang.Object
com.example.myapplication.Comment
public class Comment extends Object
This is a comment class it represents one comment It stores the text, date, who made the comment on which device, and when

  • Constructor Details

    • Comment

      public Comment()
      Empty constructor

    • Comment

      public Comment(String commentText, String userName, String deviceId, com.google.firebase.Timestamp timestamp)
      Constructor for the Comment class. This initializes all the variables
      Parameters:
      commentText - This is the text for the comment, this is the actual content
      userName - This is the name of the user that made the comment
      deviceId - This is the ID of the android device that made the comment
      timestamp - This is the time that the comment was written

  • Method Details

    • getCommentText

      public String getCommentText()
      This returns the text of the comment, i.e the content
      Returns:
      commentText This is the content of the comment

    • setCommentText

      public void setCommentText(String commentText)
      This sets the comment content
      Parameters:
      commentText - The content is passed in

    • getUserName

      public String getUserName()
      This returns the user who made the comment
      Returns:
      userName This is the name of the user that made the comment

    • setUserName

      public void setUserName(String userName)
      This sets the person who made the comment
      Parameters:
      userName - The name of the user is passed in

    • getDeviceId

      public String getDeviceId()
      This returns the id of the device that made the comment
      Returns:
      deviceId This is the id of the device

    • setDeviceId

      public void setDeviceId(String deviceId)
      This sets the Id of the device that made the comment
      Parameters:
      deviceId - Passed in Id of the device that made the comment

    • getTimestamp

      public com.google.firebase.Timestamp getTimestamp()
      This returns the time that the comment was written
      Returns:
      timestamp The time that the comment was written

    • setTimestamp

      public void setTimestamp(com.google.firebase.Timestamp timestamp)
      This sets the time that the comment was written
      Parameters:
      timestamp - This is passed in and is a timestamp of the time that the comment was written

    • getCommentId

      public String getCommentId()
      This gets the id of the comment
      Returns:
      commentId This is the id of the comment that is returned

    • setCommentId

      public void setCommentId(String commentId)
      This sets the id of the comment
      Parameters:
      commentId - Passed in Id to set the comment, helps with deleting comments

    • getReplyCount

      public int getReplyCount()
      This gets how many replies a comment has
      Returns:
      Integer that is how many reply a comment has

    • setReplyCount

      public void setReplyCount(int replyCount)
      This sets the reply count of the comment
      Parameters:
      replyCount - Passed in count for how many replies a comment has

    • getReactions

      public Map<String,String> getReactions()
      This gets the reactions that a comment has
      Returns:
      Returns the hashmap that stores the reactions

    • setReactions

      public void setReactions(Map<String,String> reactions)
      This sets the reactions for a comment
      Parameters:
      reactions - Passed in reaction to store
